programme.desc: A 95-year-old navy veteran is winched from the deck of a cruise ship, having lain undiscovered in his cabin for 11 hours. Plus, the dental team has to take to the road to get to patients across Shetland

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles is at the helm with experts Danny Sebastian and Caroline Hawley, as two teams scour the antiques centre in the hope that they can make the greater profit at auction. There are plenty of highs and lows in the saleroom, while Eric also gets the chance to meet an unlikely war hero

programme.title: The Heights
programme.desc: Kam is schooled in privilege, and Leonie makes excuses to stick with Erika. Fiona Press and Mitchell Bourke star

programme.title: Celebrity Eggheads
programme.desc: Consumer journalists Jasmine Birtles, Chris Hollins, Simon Calder, Adam Pearson and Rebecca Wilcox compete in a charity edition hosted by Jeremy Vine

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton is tasked with helping a couple and their young sons quit London to make a new life for themselves in Derbyshire, with a budget of £475,000. He also spends time with an artisan craftsman who is bringing back the local skill of knife-making

programme.title: Call That Hard Work?
programme.desc: Poultry farmer Andrew, restaurant manager Angela and performer Jack go head to head in a bid to prove their job is the hardest. The trio get off to a cracking start sorting thousands of eggs on poultry farmer Andrew's smallholding in Berkshire. While performer Jack takes his new role a little too slowly, restaurant manager Angela finds herself in a total scramble. The next day, both Andrew and Jack struggle to memorise four menus as they prepare to serve 40 covers at the high-end Indian restaurant where Angela works. For their final day, both the poultry farmer and restaurant manager face their fears to perform in front of a 45-strong audience at top tourist attraction the London Dungeon. Narrated by Sunetra Sarker

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Stephanie Connell embark on the last leg of their journey. Steph tries her hand at playing the bagpipes in Hexham, Northumberland, while Phil finds out how coal mining led to the development of Britain's rail network. The duo then meet at the final auction in Darlington, Co Durham

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Ronan Keating acts as co-host alongside Alex Jones for the usual mix of celebrity guests and stories about people in extraordinary circumstances

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: A Matter of Loaf and Death
programme.desc: The duo open their own bakery, Top Bun, and business is soon booming - not least because a 'cereal killer' is targeting all the rival bakers in town. Even better, Wallace has caught the eye of local beauty Piella Bakewell. But Gromit is more concerned that his master might become the killer's next victim. With the voices of Peter Sallis and Sally Lindsay

programme.title: The Royal Edinburgh Military Tattoo
programme.desc: Bill Paterson narrates highlights of the event held on the esplanade of Edinburgh Castle, with the RAF College Band taking centre stage as the year's home service. Others featured include the Combined Bands of the Royal Cavalry of the Sultanate of Oman, the United States Air Force Honor Guard Drill Team, the Royal Marines Band Plymouth, the Band of the Royal Regiment of Scotland, the Central Band of the Czech Armed Forces and the Banda Monumental de Mexico, the Tattoo Dance Company and the Top Secret Drum Corps

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Guest panellists Jack Dee, Romesh Ranganathan, Gaby Roslin and Tinchy Stryder join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy show in which participants attempt to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Conor and Jock decide it's time to move out of home and head to Spain to run a bar. First to receive the Spain news is Mairead, who is in disbelief - how is she going to keep digging them out of holes when they're living overseas? Billy Murphy receives unexpected information that causes him to faint - resulting in a large lump on his head and concern for Mairead and the lads. Then, Sergeant Healy arrives at the door with a barbershop quartet serenading Mairead as he's about to propose. Chris Walley, Alex Murphy and Hilary Rose star

programme.title: The Witches of Eastwick (1987)
programme.desc: Three single women dabble in magic to conjure up the perfect lover, and unintentionally summon Satan himself, who seduces them one by one. They come to realise the danger the lecherous devil presents and decide to end their relationships, but the infernal rogue does not take kindly to rejection. Fantasy comedy based on John Updike's novel, with Jack Nicholson, Cher, Michelle Pfeiffer and Susan Sarandon

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather. Presented by Dan Walker and Naga Munchetty

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: The park sees the formation of its first ever all female wolf pack, and Ben gets a peek at some incredible footage of male koala, Burke

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell visits a property in Birmingham with some mesmerising wallpaper and a south Wales house that has her dancing with joy. Meanwhile, Dion Dublin is in Liverpool to see a place that has him a bit confused

programme.title: Island Medics
programme.desc: An oil rig worker from Tyne and Wear is rushed to the A&E department of Gilbert Bain Hospital with a suspected stroke

programme.title: Bargain Hunt

programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Heights

programme.title: Celebrity Eggheads

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton goes house hunting with a couple who want their £950,000 budget to buy them a family home in the West Sussex countryside that will give them a better work-life balance. While there, the presenter heads to the seaside town of Worthing, and finds out how one of the oldest working cinemas in the country has been saved from redevelopment

programme.title: Call That Hard Work?
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Olly, sandwich factory supervisor Ruth and zookeeper Charlotte compete, taking turns at doing one another's jobs before one of them walks away with the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Philip Serrell and Stephanie Connell head to an auction in Hamilton. Steph comes across a chic French sign, but Phil is distracted by the local cuisine

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Magazine show, with stories of interest from around the UK, plus celebrity guests in the studio

programme.title: Our Lives
programme.desc: Following the life of 57-year-old Lorraine, a tribute act to the American pop star, Pink, exploring what it takes to spend your life pretending to be someone else

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: The team restores a rusty toy pedal car that is missing its steering wheel, a Victorian stamp perforating machine, a bronze statue of a dagger-wielding assassin by leading French artist Claire Colinet, and a baize-covered card table dating from the 1940s that has sentimental value for its owner

programme.title: Reported Missing
programme.desc: When his father misses an appointment with his mental health worker, 25-year-old Oli calls Gloucestershire Police, concerned about the whereabouts of his father, Michael, who suffers from paranoid schizophrenia and is thought to have stopped taking his medication. With no sign of Michael overnight, police launch an appeal for information, and CCTV searches of the town reveal that Michael got into a taxi two nights before and was taken to a high point in the Cotswold's. Officers prepare for a major search operation, but looking for someone hiding in a heavily wooded area presents them with major challenges

programme.title: Countryside College
programme.desc: Following students in the 2019/20 academic year at the College of Agriculture Food and Rural Enterprise at Muckamore near Antrim. At the start of a new academic year, the CAFRE students settle back in to busy college life, and get hands on with the term's practical food, farming and foal projects

programme.title: Fort Salem
programme.desc: Supernatural drama set in an alternate America, following three young witches from basic training in combat magic into early deployment on the military frontline to fight against a dangerous rebel group called The Spree. Starring Taylor Hickson, Jessica Sutton and Ashley Nicole Williams

programme.title: Fort Salem
programme.desc: The unit travels to Salem Town for an annual witch celebration, but an unexpected disturbance throws the proceedings into chaos. Meanwhile, Tally wonders if she made the right choice to embark on a military career. Supernatural drama, starring Taylor Hickson and Jessica Sutton

programme.title: Celebrity MasterChef
programme.desc: John Torode and Gregg Wallace look back on further highlights from 15 years of the show, remembering some of the most entertaining team challenges - and how different dynamics can lead to either success or chaos in the kitchen. They also revisit a 2015 semi-final task which saw Sheree Murphy, Scott Maslen, Rylan Clark-Neal, Sam Nixon, Chesney Hawkes, Mica Paris, Kimberly Wyatt and Tom Parker thrown together in a Victorian-style village, using only ingredients widely available during that era

programme.title: Fake Britain
programme.desc: Dom Littlewood and Michelle Ackerley investigate the fake Botox treatment that left one woman with life changing injuries. Elsewhere, a report on false online reviews that are ruining business across the UK, deadly fake camping stoves that can explode when they are lit, and Michelle tests imitation Airpods headphones

programme.title: Celebrity MasterChef
programme.desc: John Torode and Gregg Wallace recall some of the best - and the worst - reviews of the celebrities' creations. From members of the Women's Institute to previous finalists and the forthright opinions of the restaurant critics, the role of the external opinion is a crucial one. John and Gregg also revisit a classic challenge from 2011, in which the five semi-finalists were tasked with cooking the much-loved recipes from residents of a retirement village

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The president of the local cricket club is found shot dead in the middle of the pitch after a recent victory. Suspicion falls on his family and fellow players, but all of them have an alibi. JP thinks Dwayne is keeping something from him and wonders how well he knows his friend, and Humphrey dreads Martha's imminent departure from the island

programme.title: The Day Mountbatten Died
programme.desc: On 27 August, 1979, Lord Louis Mountbatten, great uncle to Prince Charles, was blown up at sea by the IRA off the west coast of Ireland. Three others were killed on the boat that day, including two teenage boys, and later that afternoon the IRA killed 18 British soldiers across the border in Northern Ireland. Forty years on, this is the story of that remarkable Bank Holiday Monday told by those directly affected by it

programme.title: Fighting the Power: Britain After George Floyd

programme.desc: Nazanin Zaghari-Ratcliffe has been held prisoner in Iran for more than four years after being convicted of spying charges. programme.desc: Local, national and international news reports

programme.desc: The soldiers of the special forces are still trying to find their way home and a survival expert is keen to share his skills

programme.title: Bonn Còmhraidh
programme.desc: Donald Morrison takes a look back at the various forms of employment filmed for Bonn Còmhraidh during the 1970s, including a report from Benbecula on the army's relationship with the local community, and the problems caused by a lack of road building on Harris. Plus, highlights from the 1977 Royal Highland Show

programme.title: Ceòlmhor @ Piping Live
programme.desc: Performances from the best of the 2017 festival, including acclaimed piper José Manuel Tejedor, Irish duo Gráinne Brady and Ryan Murphy, and South Uist piper Micheal Steele

programme.title: Dealbhan Fraoich (Heather's Portraits)
programme.desc: Heather Dewar travels to Barra where she draws a keen traveller, whose experiences in foreign countries have had a profound impact of her life, outlook and even her health

programme.title: Opry Dhoire
programme.desc: Daniel O'Donnell celebrates the life of Irish country music singer Larry Cunningham. With contributors Declan Nerney, Mike Denver, Philomena Begley and Hugo Duncan. Narrated by Anne Sinclair

programme.title: The Optimists
programme.desc: Russian drama set in the 1960s during the Khrushchev era and at the height of the Cold War. In Russian

programme.title: Manran aig Barrowland
programme.desc: A concert from Mànran and Trail West recorded on St Andrew's Day, 2018. The bands play in front of the 2,000 music fans who packed this concert at the fabled Barrowland Ballroom

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: BBC Alba joins Radio nan Gàidheal, the BBC's Gaelic language radio service

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: Morning magazine featuring a lively mix of news and current affairs, plus health, entertainment and lifestyle features

programme.title: Lorraine
programme.desc: Entertainment, current affairs and fashion news, as well as showbiz stories and celebrity gossip. Presented by Lorraine Kelly

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions

programme.title: Loose Women
programme.desc: Another helping of topical studio discussion from a female perspective, featuring celebrity interviews

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson and his dealers are in Colwyn Bay in Wales, where James Layte is thrilled to stumble upon a Lewis Carroll first edition, Helen Gardiner falls for an oil lamp, and Mark Stevens comes across a car mascot

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Five family members from Harrow, north-west London, answer questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Warwick Davis hosts

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Ailsa, Sarah, Kelly and Matt pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon and Bob interfere, Nate reassures Tracy, while Paul cooks things up - but will it work?

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Carla is suspicious when Peter lies to her about going to meet Abi, and when she finds out he is helping her with her addiction, she warns him to be careful. When Gemma presents Paul with a signed photo of PJ and Duncan, Paul can hardly believe his eyes, while Jenny greets Johnny's return with hostility

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. Airside officer Ian has a close shave out on the runway. Meanwhile, veteran Border Force officers Glen and Amarjit hunt down smuggled cargo

programme.title: Coronation Street Icons
programme.desc: Sally Lindsay celebrates the best moments from Sally Dynevor's 34-year career on Coronation Street, with the help of clips from the archives and interviews with co-stars. The actress reveals how she nearly messed up her role as Sally on her first day in 1986 because she dressed as a punk. Michael Le Vell recalls the moment he first set eyes on her, while other contributors include Brooke Vincent (Sophie Webster), Helen Flanagan (Rosie Webster), Joe Duttine (Tim Metcalfe), William Roache (Ken Barlow), David Neilson (Roy Cropper) and Beverley Callard (Liz McDonald)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective looks forward to a quiet Christmas, but is disturbed by the Foreign Office when an Egyptian prince loses a famous ruby - after making the mistake of lending it to a mysterious woman. Guest starring Stephanie Cole, Nigel Le Vaillant and Tariq Alibai

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Piers Morgan's Life Stories
programme.desc: The Lancashire cricketer reflects on his life and career. He talks candidly about resorting to extreme measures as he battled with his weight, looks back at the key role he played in England's 2005 Ashes triumph and relives the victory celebrations - when he was asked to leave the Cabinet Room at 10 Downing Street for pretending to be the Prime Minister. 'Freddie' also discusses his recent return to the sport, after doctors advised him never to run again upon his retirement in 2010

programme.title: British Touring Car Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Steve Rider looks back at races seven, eight and nine of the British Touring Car Championship season at Oulton Park. Commentary comes from David Addison and Tim Harvey, with Louise Goodman reporting

programme.title: James Martin's American Adventure

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. Airside officer Ian has a close shave out on the runway. Meanwhile, veteran Border Force officers Glen and Amarjit hunt down smuggled cargo

programme.title: Coronation Street Icons
programme.desc: Sally Lindsay celebrates the best moments from Sally Dynevor's 34-year career on Coronation Street, with the help of clips from the archives and interviews with co-stars. The actress reveals how she nearly messed up her role as Sally on her first day in 1986 because she dressed as a punk. Michael Le Vell recalls the moment he first set eyes on her, while other contributors include Brooke Vincent (Sophie Webster), Helen Flanagan (Rosie Webster), Joe Duttine (Tim Metcalfe), William Roache (Ken Barlow), David Neilson (Roy Cropper) and Beverley Callard (Liz McDonald)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective looks forward to a quiet Christmas, but is disturbed by the Foreign Office when an Egyptian prince loses a famous ruby - after making the mistake of lending it to a mysterious woman. Guest starring Stephanie Cole, Nigel Le Vaillant and Tariq Alibai

programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Piers Morgan's Life Stories
programme.desc: The Lancashire cricketer reflects on his life and career. He talks candidly about resorting to extreme measures as he battled with his weight, looks back at the key role he played in England's 2005 Ashes triumph and relives the victory celebrations - when he was asked to leave the Cabinet Room at 10 Downing Street for pretending to be the Prime Minister. 'Freddie' also discusses his recent return to the sport, after doctors advised him never to run again upon his retirement in 2010

programme.title: Paul (2011)

programme.desc: Peter and Quagmire form a singer-songwriter partnership a la Simon and Garfunkel when they realise how beautiful their voices sound together. However, tensions run high when fame goes to Peter's head

programme.desc: Harry Hill identifies more celebrity lookalikes in a comical selection of viewer-submitted videos, featuring doppelgangers of Matthew Kelly, Steven Spielberg and Osama bin Laden, plus the rare and moving sight of a car giving birth

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Dina agrees to take the heat when corporate forces Amy to cut everyone's hours. Jonah and the other employees play an elaborate game of laser tag with the store's new scanners, while Mateo makes a startling discovery about Marcus. Comedy, starring America Ferrera

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy and Jonah use a photograph of the store to their advantage, while Dina hunts for the anonymous tweeter, and Mateo, Cheyenne, Garrett and Glenn struggle for cash

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Craig from Cheshire picks three blind dates from five potential partners, based entirely on the menus they have come up with. After having dinner with each of them, he decides who he wants to see again

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: In London, Amanda, Katy and Alex battle it out to impress Georgina with their style choices. With nothing but their chosen outfits to help her decide, who will Georgina choose to take out on a first date?

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring everything from giddy grandmas, cute kids and crazy animals to below-the-belt mishaps, practical jokers and painful-looking accidents

programme.title: Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity edition of the game show, asking Rob Beckett, Ruth Jones and Jordan Banjo to 'see it and say it' as they try to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues. After the first elimination, the two remaining players battle to reach the Super Catchphrase round, where one of them could win £50,000 for their chosen charity

programme.title: The Ellen DeGeneres Show
programme.desc: The host is joined by Dakota Johnson and Zack Gottsagen, who discuss starring alongside Shia LaBeouf in The Peanut Butter Falcon

programme.title: Ellen's Game of Games
programme.desc: Volunteers from Ellen's studio audience play her outrageously fun games including You Bet Your Wife, Blindfolded Musical Chairs, Say Whaaat? and Make It Rain

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Roxanne from London picks three blind dates from five potential partners, based entirely on the menus they have created. Having dined with the three men, she decides who she wants to see again. Narrated by Charlotte Hudson

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: In Manchester, suitors Billy, Louis and Peter suitors buy an outfit for singleton Allissia. The aspiring model then goes on a date with the person whose taste in clothes they liked best

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring everything from giddy grandmas, cute kids and crazy animals to below-the-belt mishaps, practical jokers and painful-looking accidents

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Comedian Harry Hill narrates a selection of camcorder calamities and viewers' mobile-phone footage from the You've Been Framed! archives featuring children, from messy eaters to troublesome teens and sibling rivalries

programme.title: Spectre (2015)
programme.desc: James Bond goes rogue after receiving a cryptic message that sets him on the trail of a secretive criminal network. While his colleagues face a new threat closer to home, 007 embarks on a globetrotting journey in search of the elusive mastermind behind the syndicate - whom he discovers may have links to his own past and had involvement in previous events during some of Bond's most dangerous missions. Spy thriller, starring Daniel Craig, Christoph Waltz, Lea Seydoux, Ben Whishaw and Ralph Fiennes

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Spectre (2015)
programme.desc: James Bond goes rogue after receiving a cryptic message that sets him on the trail of a secretive criminal network. While his colleagues face a new threat closer to home, 007 embarks on a globetrotting journey in search of the elusive mastermind behind the syndicate - whom he discovers may have links to his own past and had involvement in previous events during some of Bond's most dangerous missions. Spy thriller, starring Daniel Craig, Christoph Waltz, Lea Seydoux, Ben Whishaw and Ralph Fiennes

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Brian spots a chance to further his writing ambitions when his estranged son Dylan, now a teen reality TV star, turns up in Quahog. Meanwhile, a hunting accident creates a rift between Peter and Quagmire, and as the former pals clash, Joe is forced to choose a side. Animated comedy, with the voice of Seth MacFarlane

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: The residents of Quahog turn against one another as they become embroiled in a treasure hunt sparked by Peter's interpretation of the design on a restaurant placemat

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Snot is rejected after professing his love for Hayley, so Roger decides to give him a new love interest - by pretending to be Steve's female cousin. Meanwhile, Stan tries to live like a gentleman of the 1960s, complete with dark suits and dry martinis

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan and Francine's social life gets a boost when they meet adventurous couple Tom and Cami, but they realise they cannot keep up with them. However, it isn't long before they devise a plan to slow them down permanently

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Rallo goes to stay with Robert for the weekend, but is forced to spend time with an unsavoury crowd when his host goes on a trip to Baltimore. Meanwhile, Cleveland and his friends hang out in Stoolbend Cemetery, and begin to appreciate the peacefulness of the location

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: An outbreak of headlice at school forces Rallo to cut off his beloved Afro, and when the other kids make fun of him, Cleveland Jr steps in to look after his little brother. Meanwhile, Freight Train and Cookie leave Cleveland to house-sit for the weekend, but things go badly wrong when his friends visit

programme.title: Release the Hounds
programme.desc: Horror game show, hosted by Reggie Yates, in which three gymnastics teachers enter a forest at dusk and endure a series of spooky challenges during which they must unlock chests full of prize money. In order to win the jackpot they need to get back out again, but the cash is protected by a pack of angry dogs

programme.title: Totally Bonkers Guinness World Records
programme.desc: A selection of some of incredible and peculiar records, including the world's longest snake, the heaviest vehicle pulled by nipples and the longest distance run on hot plates

programme.desc: Alec plans to put on a talent night. Martin and Gail are stunned when Don asks Nick to be his business partner. Alf announces to the residents that the street is to be renamed

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The receivers take over the garage and go through the books with Don. Kevin is made redundant with two weeks' pay. Maxine confesses to Fiona that she is going out with Tony

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Vic feels bad about causing Tom to lose his job. Charlie is horrified to hear Tony talk about adoption of Emma's baby. The Dingles start their bus service

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: A social worker speaks to Emma about her baby. Terry tries to clear the air with Viv, and she changes her mind about leaving Vic. Rachel gives Chris her divorce papers

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Steve comes to the aid of an amnesiac struggling to piece together his identity, Jenny tells Dennis she is tired of playing second fiddle to his career, and Bernie and David step in when it appears Vernon's money-making schemes are getting the better of him. Rural drama, starring James Carlton, Ian East, Peter Benson, David Lonsdale and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: A misunderstanding between Sid and Betty leads to chaos and confusion. Family comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: A death in the family causes problems for Sid. Comedy, starring Diana Coupland

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: When Mildred finds out that George only has a small endowment, she decides to do something about it. However, George is none too happy when he realises that he is worth more dead than alive. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth finds himself in interesting company as English socialites and American millionaires rub shoulders on board a train bound for the French Riviera. Passengers include oil magnate Rufus Van Aldin (Elliott Gould) and his daughter Ruth (Jaime Murray) - to whom he has given a magnificent ruby known as the Heart of Fire. With members of the aristocracy crammed into a confined space with their husbands, lovers and a renowned gemstone, murder cannot be far away. With Lindsay Duncan, Roger Lloyd Pack and James D'Arcy

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Alf Ventress mounts a large-scale surveillance operation in an effort to track down the wool thief responsible for de-fleecing sheep in Aidensfield. Bernie finds himself in hot water when an estranged son arrives to bury his father - who is already six feet under. Drama, starring James Carlton and Peter Benson

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Emma insists she is not having second thoughts about having the baby adopted. Dee enjoys her day with Eric at the auction. Zak worries that Albert will steal Lisa off him

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: A wheel comes off the Dingles' bus and it crashes into a fruit stall. Rachel attacks Chris for going ahead with the sale of Mill Cottage

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim gets his inheritance from his mother's estate, and Liz is furious when Jim tells her he wants to buy the house. Don wallows in self-pity, feeling he has lost everything

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tony asks Fiona not to sack Maxine. Tricia asks Des to help her track down Terry as she is pregnant with his baby. Liz panics when she hears Steve has been in a prison fight

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Richard Abernethie is found dead shortly after disinheriting his sole heir and specifying that his legacy is to be divided equally among the remaining family members. Poirot is called in by his solicitor friend Gilbert Entwhistle, to ascertain whether the late Mr Abernethie met with foul play - and also finds time to investigate the murder of a beneficiary under the new terms of the will. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Robert Bathurst, Anna Calder-Marshall and Geraldine James

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Alf Ventress mounts a large-scale surveillance operation in an effort to track down the wool thief responsible for de-fleecing sheep in Aidensfield. Bernie finds himself in hot water when an estranged son arrives to bury his father - who is already six feet under. Drama, starring James Carlton and Peter Benson

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth sets out to solve the baffling murder of a Cambridge don who met with foul play shortly after deciding to change his will. Starring David Suchet, Beth Goddard and Mark Kingston

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Alison from Hertfordshire searches the sister she did not know existed for over 50 years, after discovering old family photographs in a wallet. The photographs showed Alison's mother holding a baby with 'Amanda' written on the back and a date of 1951, meaning Alison has a half-sister she never knew. Elsewhere in the programme, John, a builder from Yorkshire, is haunted by not knowing his father, and after applying for his adoption files, he begins the search for his birth parents, Marlene and Kenneth

programme.title: The Comedy Years
programme.desc: Important comedy milestones of 1998, including The Royle Family and Goodness Gracious Me, and the final episodes of Drop the Dead Donkey and Father Ted. Narrated by Hugh Bonneville

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: DS Sam Casey, a young officer with a strong sense of justice, is brought in to investigate the shooting of Devlin outside the Old Bailey, and is surprised to learn the gunman was specifically targeting police officers. The case sees the whole team emotionally spent, with the trial itself at risk of being derailed by a politically driven defence lawyer (Colin Salmon) with an axe to grind. Crime drama, starring Bradley Walsh, Freema Agyeman and Paul Nicholls, who joins the cast

programme.title: Prime Suspect 1973
programme.desc: Following the revelation of the red Jaguar in George and Mary Collins' garage, the pair protest their innocence about their daughter's final days - but the case against them hardens when forensics officers discover further signs of violence against Julie Ann in their home. With the timeline of Julie Ann's injuries not adding up, Jane pursues a witness who say Eddie visited George Collins the night before her death, while Clifford Bentley is released from prison and returns home to a hero's welcome

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Leaving behind his beloved Oxford, Morse and a reluctant Lewis set off to investigate the bizarre death of an Englishwoman who was attending a psychotherapy clinic in northern Italy. Their inquiries lead them to the vineyards and villas of Vicenza and the city of Verona - as well as a glamorous opera singer and a convicted fraudster. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star as the detective duo, with Frances Barber, Michael Kitchen, James Grout and Jolyon Baker

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper sleuth returns to his home country of Belgium for the first time since the First World War to attend a medal ceremony, only to find a murder case needs solving. Agatha Christie mystery, starring David Suchet, Anna Chancellor and David De Keyser

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean and Sid are faced with a dilemma when they notice strange goings-on next door. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George trades his car in for a battered caravan, and Mildred's sister and brother-in-law arrive, leading to problems in the bedroom. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy, Yootha Joyce, Norman Eshley and Sheila Fearn

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Richard Abernethie is found dead shortly after disinheriting his sole heir and specifying that his legacy is to be divided equally among the remaining family members. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Robert Bathurst, Anna Calder-Marshall and Geraldine James

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A serious assault leads the police to foil an attempt to steal antiques from Ashfordly Hall, and Vernon goes all-out to persuade a wealthy woman to make a charitable contribution toward his donkey sanctuary - but the discovery that there is already one in the area forces him to change his plans. Meanwhile, Merton devises a solution to Ventress's retirement worries. Rosemary Leach guest stars

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah is worried about Andy's aggressive nature. Chris asks his credit card company for more time to pay off his debts. Paddy plucks up the courage to ask Mandy out

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Cairns argue about Emma going missing. Steve advises Paddy to forget Mandy. Linda tells Biff that as he is getting his job back they can afford to start a family

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz asks Fiona to visit Steve, Nick accuses Audrey of spying on him, Vera refuses to believe that Tricia is carrying Terry's baby, and Alec holds the talent night at the Rovers

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vera does not want Jack to know what Tricia has told her about being pregnant. Audrey and Alf are surprised when Nick goes missing. Kevin gets an interview at Fastfitters

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Crime writer Ariadne Oliver (My Family's Zoe Wanamaker) and four known killers are among those who meet Poirot at a bridge evening arranged by wealthy adventurer Shaitana, who sits out the first game - only to be found later stabbed through the heart. As nobody has left or entered the victim's apartment during the night, the guests combine their skills to discover which of the party is responsible. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Lesley Manville and Alex Jennings

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A serious assault leads the police to foil an attempt to steal antiques from Ashfordly Hall, and Vernon goes all-out to persuade a wealthy woman to make a charitable contribution toward his donkey sanctuary - but the discovery that there is already one in the area forces him to change his plans. Meanwhile, Merton devises a solution to Ventress's retirement worries. Rosemary Leach guest stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian detective, who usually only accepts cases of national importance, bends his rules for once and finds himself in run-down Clapham. He investigates the disappearance of a local cook and becomes intrigued by the contents of the woman's trunk. David Suchet stars, alongside Hugh Fraser and Brigit Forsyth

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Nearly 40 years after he left her mother to return to Nigeria, mum-of-three Laura searches for her birth father, who promised that he would come back for her. Meanwhile, 71-year-old Linda from Somerset searches for her twin sisters, who were given up for adoption by their father when her mother sadly passed away and he could no longer cope with Linda and her four younger siblings on his own

programme.title: The Comedy Years
programme.desc: A look at comedy in 2003, when Tim, Lee and Dawn's love triangle reached a memorable conclusion in The Office and the original run of Cold Feet bowed out with a tragic storyline. It was also the year when members of the public found themselves the unwitting comedy stooges of hidden-camera shows like Trigger Happy TV and Three Non Blondes, Bruce Forsyth made a memorable appearance as guest host of Have I Got News for You and comedy legend Bob Monkhouse performed his last stand-up gig to an audience of fellow comics in a small London pub

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Ronnie and Sam are given 10 hours to find a hostage who was taken by two armed men, following a bungled robbery in which an innocent 'have-a-go-hero' was shot dead. When one of the accused is seized, the team is offered a deal - he will tell them the location of the captive in return for immunity from prosecution. Tamzin Outhwaite guest stars as uncompromising lawyer Miriam Pescatore

programme.title: Prime Suspect 1973
programme.desc: The mysterious Oz is brought into the station for questioning - but the suspect has been badly beaten, and hot-headed detective Gibbs is on the hook for the attack. The case takes an unexpected turn when another body is found in the canal, leaving Bradfield wondering whether they are looking at a double murder, while Tennison's integrity is tested when the DI asks her to make a decision that could have huge consequences for her career. Clifford Bentley and his sons start digging from the cafe to the bank, but they risk getting caught when David fails to notice the police outside

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective gains a taste of prison life while investigating the murder of an inmate jailed for a property swindle. The victim's two partners-in-crime are also incarcerated in the same low-security cell block. Morse is determined to find out whether they know anything about the killing, but has to avoid offending the prison authorities while also dealing with a brash subordinate. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with guest appearances by Sean Bean, Richard Wilson, Jim Broadbent, Diana Quick and Steven Mackintosh

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: On doctor's orders, the dapper Belgian sleuth visits Brighton for what he hopes will be a relaxing holiday, but it leads to one of the most absorbing cases he has ever faced - the disappearance of a cache of jewels. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Hermione Norris, Philip Jackson and Sorcha Cusack

programme.title: George and Mildred

Meanwhile, Vernon encounters dangerous wildlife as he stashes his capital in Ashfordly woods, but decides to turn the incident into another money-making scheme. Geoffrey Hughes stars

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Robert is jealous that all the talk in the Sugden household is about Andy. Mandy accuses Viv of ruining her job prospects. Rachel bans Chris from seeing Joseph

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack is worried about money. Vic is pleased to get a postcard from Kelly telling him that she is okay. Zoe decides to hand over responsibility for Home Farm business to Steve

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz refuses to accept Jim's offer on the house. Vera tries to find out if Terry spent time at Tricia's flat. Martin is horrified to learn Nick has been missing for four days

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gail contacts the police about Nick being missing, and Don thinks the Platts have driven his grandson away. Vera tells Jack that they should support Tricia

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Millionaire Gordon Cloade's wife is widowed for the second time at the tender age of 23, arousing the suspicions of his impoverished relatives. Fanning the flames of envy and hatred, psychic aunt Kathy Cloade reveals the grieving widow's first husband is in fact still alive, and a second death prompts Poirot to delve deeper into the family's dark secrets. David Suchet stars, with Jenny Agutter, Tim Piggot-Smith and Celia Imrie

programme.title: Heartbeat

Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Hermione Norris, Philip Jackson and Sorcha Cusack

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa wants Martin to engage more with James, so she arranges for him to take their baby to playgroup, where he has to pair up with a mother and daughter and sing songs. Meanwhile, Al signs up to a dating website, Bert is suspicious when he catches Jennifer in the bathroom with a needle, and Ruth moves into a cottage in the village, but soon has trouble with a grumpy new neighbour (Ronald Pickup)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Obsessive-compulsive Mrs Tishell returns to the village, but her affection for Martin quickly disappears when he refuses to pass her fit for work. As if he didn't have enough on his plate, the grumpy doctor must also face his fear of blood when tests show that Lorna has a high level of ferritin, which is placing a strain on her heart and liver. Meanwhile, PC Penhale hopes to be selected for an elite police squad by taking part in a survival training course - but ends up shooting himself in the foot

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks is forced to reopen a 14-year-old case when a dying crack addict confesses to the murder of teenager Amanda Bennet, a crime for which her father Simon (guest star Tim McInnerny) was originally convicted. Brooks becomes torn between the belief of his former partner Bernie Rawlins and mounting doubts over the ability of current colleague Casey, and the case unearths the possibility that more ghosts from his drinking days will come back to haunt him. Starring Bradley Walsh and Paul Nicholls

programme.title: Prime Suspect 1973
programme.desc: Bradfield sees a chance to get revenge on Clifford and diverts the team to carry out surveillance on the Bentleys - and when Tennison learns of the operation, she is forced to make a split-second decision as to what is most important, her career or her family? As Bradfield uncovers more details about the heist, he faces the disapproval of his colleagues as he becomes determined to catch them in the act

programme.title: Prime Suspect 1973
programme.desc: The police officers are numb after the explosion, and as they search the rubble, they make a horrifying realisation. The Bentleys make one last stand as a manhunt is launched for Clifford and David, while a distraught Renee is put under arrest. Before long Tennison makes one final discovery about Julie Ann's murder - but as she gets closer to solving the case, she finds herself in mortal danger. Stefanie Martini stars as the novice WPC who would eventually become the tough senior detective made famous by Helen Mirren

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The detective discovers his half-sister's daughter has committed suicide and sets out to find what prompted it, entering the world of teenage rave parties and drug-taking. Meanwhile, Lewis has his sights set on promotion and studies for exams. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Sorcha Cusack, Jason Isaacs and John Junkin

programme.desc: The sleuth finds himself in interesting company as English socialites and American millionaires rub shoulders on board a train bound for the French Riviera. Passengers include oil magnate Rufus Van Aldin (Elliott Gould) and his daughter Ruth (Jaime Murray) - to whom he has given a magnificent ruby known as the Heart of Fire. With members of the aristocracy crammed into a confined space with their husbands, lovers and a renowned gemstone, murder cannot be far away. With Lindsay Duncan, Roger Lloyd Pack and James D'Arcy

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Alf Ventress mounts a large-scale surveillance operation in an effort to track down the wool thief responsible for de-fleecing sheep in Aidensfield. Bernie finds himself in hot water when an estranged son arrives to bury his father - who is already six feet under. Drama, starring James Carlton and Peter Benson

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Emma insists she is not having second thoughts about having the baby adopted. Dee enjoys her day with Eric at the auction. Zak worries that Albert will steal Lisa off him

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: A wheel comes off the Dingles' bus and it crashes into a fruit stall. Rachel attacks Chris for going ahead with the sale of Mill Cottage

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jim gets his inheritance from his mother's estate, and Liz is furious when Jim tells her he wants to buy the house. Don wallows in self-pity, feeling he has lost everything

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tony asks Fiona not to sack Maxine. Tricia asks Des to help her track down Terry as she is pregnant with his baby. Liz panics when she hears Steve has been in a prison fight

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Richard Abernethie is found dead shortly after disinheriting his sole heir and specifying that his legacy is to be divided equally among the remaining family members. Poirot is called in by his solicitor friend Gilbert Entwhistle, to ascertain whether the late Mr Abernethie met with foul play - and also finds time to investigate the murder of a beneficiary under the new terms of the will. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Robert Bathurst, Anna Calder-Marshall and Geraldine James

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Alf Ventress mounts a large-scale surveillance operation in an effort to track down the wool thief responsible for de-fleecing sheep in Aidensfield. Bernie finds himself in hot water when an estranged son arrives to bury his father - who is already six feet under. Drama, starring James Carlton and Peter Benson

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth sets out to solve the baffling murder of a Cambridge don who met with foul play shortly after deciding to change his will. Starring David Suchet, Beth Goddard and Mark Kingston

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Alison from Hertfordshire searches the sister she did not know existed for over 50 years, after discovering old family photographs in a wallet. The photographs showed Alison's mother holding a baby with 'Amanda' written on the back and a date of 1951, meaning Alison has a half-sister she never knew. Elsewhere in the programme, John, a builder from Yorkshire, is haunted by not knowing his father, and after applying for his adoption files, he begins the search for his birth parents, Marlene and Kenneth

programme.title: The Comedy Years
programme.desc: Important comedy milestones of 1998, including The Royle Family and Goodness Gracious Me, and the final episodes of Drop the Dead Donkey and Father Ted. Narrated by Hugh Bonneville

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: DS Sam Casey, a young officer with a strong sense of justice, is brought in to investigate the shooting of Devlin outside the Old Bailey, and is surprised to learn the gunman was specifically targeting police officers. The case sees the whole team emotionally spent, with the trial itself at risk of being derailed by a politically driven defence lawyer (Colin Salmon) with an axe to grind. Crime drama, starring Bradley Walsh, Freema Agyeman and Paul Nicholls, who joins the cast

programme.title: Prime Suspect 1973
programme.desc: Following the revelation of the red Jaguar in George and Mary Collins' garage, the pair protest their innocence about their daughter's final days - but the case against them hardens when forensics officers discover further signs of violence against Julie Ann in their home. With the timeline of Julie Ann's injuries not adding up, Jane pursues a witness who say Eddie visited George Collins the night before her death, while Clifford Bentley is released from prison and returns home to a hero's welcome

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Leaving behind his beloved Oxford, Morse and a reluctant Lewis set off to investigate the bizarre death of an Englishwoman who was attending a psychotherapy clinic in northern Italy. Their inquiries lead them to the vineyards and villas of Vicenza and the city of Verona - as well as a glamorous opera singer and a convicted fraudster. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star as the detective duo, with Frances Barber, Michael Kitchen, James Grout and Jolyon Baker

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper sleuth returns to his home country of Belgium for the first time since the First World War to attend a medal ceremony, only to find a murder case needs solving. Agatha Christie mystery, starring David Suchet, Anna Chancellor and David De Keyser

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Jean and Sid are faced with a dilemma when they notice strange goings-on next door. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George trades his car in for a battered caravan, and Mildred's sister and brother-in-law arrive, leading to problems in the bedroom. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy, Yootha Joyce, Norman Eshley and Sheila Fearn

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Richard Abernethie is found dead shortly after disinheriting his sole heir and specifying that his legacy is to be divided equally among the remaining family members. Poirot is called in by his solicitor friend Gilbert Entwhistle, to ascertain whether the late Mr Abernethie met with foul play - and also finds time to investigate the murder of a beneficiary under the new terms of the will. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Robert Bathurst, Anna Calder-Marshall and Geraldine James

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A serious assault leads the police to foil an attempt to steal antiques from Ashfordly Hall, and Vernon goes all-out to persuade a wealthy woman to make a charitable contribution toward his donkey sanctuary - but the discovery that there is already one in the area forces him to change his plans. Meanwhile, Merton devises a solution to Ventress's retirement worries. Rosemary Leach guest stars

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah is worried about Andy's aggressive nature. Chris asks his credit card company for more time to pay off his debts. Paddy plucks up the courage to ask Mandy out

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The Cairns argue about Emma going missing. Steve advises Paddy to forget Mandy. Linda tells Biff that as he is getting his job back they can afford to start a family

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz asks Fiona to visit Steve, Nick accuses Audrey of spying on him, Vera refuses to believe that Tricia is carrying Terry's baby, and Alec holds the talent night at the Rovers

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vera does not want Jack to know what Tricia has told her about being pregnant. Audrey and Alf are surprised when Nick goes missing. Kevin gets an interview at Fastfitters

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Crime writer Ariadne Oliver (My Family's Zoe Wanamaker) and four known killers are among those who meet Poirot at a bridge evening arranged by wealthy adventurer Shaitana, who sits out the first game - only to be found later stabbed through the heart. As nobody has left or entered the victim's apartment during the night, the guests combine their skills to discover which of the party is responsible. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Lesley Manville and Alex Jennings

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A serious assault leads the police to foil an attempt to steal antiques from Ashfordly Hall, and Vernon goes all-out to persuade a wealthy woman to make a charitable contribution toward his donkey sanctuary - but the discovery that there is already one in the area forces him to change his plans. Meanwhile, Merton devises a solution to Ventress's retirement worries. Rosemary Leach guest stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian detective, who usually only accepts cases of national importance, bends his rules for once and finds himself in run-down Clapham. He investigates the disappearance of a local cook and becomes intrigued by the contents of the woman's trunk. David Suchet stars, alongside Hugh Fraser and Brigit Forsyth

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Nearly 40 years after he left her mother to return to Nigeria, mum-of-three Laura searches for her birth father, who promised that he would come back for her. Meanwhile, 71-year-old Linda from Somerset searches for her twin sisters, who were given up for adoption by their father when her mother sadly passed away and he could no longer cope with Linda and her four younger siblings on his own

programme.title: The Comedy Years
programme.desc: A look at comedy in 2003, when Tim, Lee and Dawn's love triangle reached a memorable conclusion in The Office and the original run of Cold Feet bowed out with a tragic storyline. It was also the year when members of the public found themselves the unwitting comedy stooges of hidden-camera shows like Trigger Happy TV and Three Non Blondes, Bruce Forsyth made a memorable appearance as guest host of Have I Got News for You and comedy legend Bob Monkhouse performed his last stand-up gig to an audience of fellow comics in a small London pub

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Ronnie and Sam are given 10 hours to find a hostage who was taken by two armed men, following a bungled robbery in which an innocent 'have-a-go-hero' was shot dead. When one of the accused is seized, the team is offered a deal - he will tell them the location of the captive in return for immunity from prosecution. Tamzin Outhwaite guest stars as uncompromising lawyer Miriam Pescatore

programme.title: Prime Suspect 1973
programme.desc: The mysterious Oz is brought into the station for questioning - but the suspect has been badly beaten, and hot-headed detective Gibbs is on the hook for the attack. The case takes an unexpected turn when another body is found in the canal, leaving Bradfield wondering whether they are looking at a double murder, while Tennison's integrity is tested when the DI asks her to make a decision that could have huge consequences for her career. Clifford Bentley and his sons start digging from the cafe to the bank, but they risk getting caught when David fails to notice the police outside

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective gains a taste of prison life while investigating the murder of an inmate jailed for a property swindle. The victim's two partners-in-crime are also incarcerated in the same low-security cell block. Morse is determined to find out whether they know anything about the killing, but has to avoid offending the prison authorities while also dealing with a brash subordinate. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with guest appearances by Sean Bean, Richard Wilson, Jim Broadbent, Diana Quick and Steven Mackintosh

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: On doctor's orders, the dapper Belgian sleuth visits Brighton for what he hopes will be a relaxing holiday, but it leads to one of the most absorbing cases he has ever faced - the disappearance of a cache of jewels. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Hermione Norris, Philip Jackson and Sorcha Cusack

programme.desc: Sid's cousin visits the Abbott household, and the bemused family have a terrible time getting rid of him. Sid James stars

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: When his boss goes on holiday, Sid assumes responsibility for guarding his property - but has trouble enforcing his regime. Comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George pushes Mildred to choose between him and the dog when he begins to resent the affection lavished upon her beloved pooch

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot

As nobody has left or entered the victim's apartment during the night, the guests combine their skills to discover which of the party is responsible. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Lesley Manville and Alex Jennings

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The Aidensfield police are puzzled when it seems a face from the past has become the unlikely victim of vandalism, and suspicions are soon aroused over the reasons for his sudden return to the village. Meanwhile, Vernon encounters dangerous wildlife as he stashes his capital in Ashfordly woods, but decides to turn the incident into another money-making scheme. Geoffrey Hughes stars

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Robert is jealous that all the talk in the Sugden household is about Andy. Mandy accuses Viv of ruining her job prospects. Rachel bans Chris from seeing Joseph

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jack is worried about money. Vic is pleased to get a postcard from Kelly telling him that she is okay. Zoe decides to hand over responsibility for Home Farm business to Steve

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz refuses to accept Jim's offer on the house. Vera tries to find out if Terry spent time at Tricia's flat. Martin is horrified to learn Nick has been missing for four days

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gail contacts the police about Nick being missing, and Don thinks the Platts have driven his grandson away. Vera tells Jack that they should support Tricia

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Millionaire Gordon Cloade's wife is widowed for the second time at the tender age of 23, arousing the suspicions of his impoverished relatives. Fanning the flames of envy and hatred, psychic aunt Kathy Cloade reveals the grieving widow's first husband is in fact still alive, and a second death prompts Poirot to delve deeper into the family's dark secrets. David Suchet stars, with Jenny Agutter, Tim Piggot-Smith and Celia Imrie

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The Aidensfield police are puzzled when it seems a face from the past has become the unlikely victim of vandalism, and suspicions are soon aroused over the reasons for his sudden return to the village. Meanwhile, Vernon encounters dangerous wildlife as he stashes his capital in Ashfordly woods, but decides to turn the incident into another money-making scheme. Geoffrey Hughes stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: On doctor's orders, the dapper Belgian sleuth visits Brighton for what he hopes will be a relaxing holiday, but it leads to one of the most absorbing cases he has ever faced - the disappearance of a cache of jewels. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Hermione Norris, Philip Jackson and Sorcha Cusack

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa wants Martin to engage more with James, so she arranges for him to take their baby to playgroup, where he has to pair up with a mother and daughter and sing songs. Meanwhile, Al signs up to a dating website, Bert is suspicious when he catches Jennifer in the bathroom with a needle, and Ruth moves into a cottage in the village, but soon has trouble with a grumpy new neighbour (Ronald Pickup)

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Obsessive-compulsive Mrs Tishell returns to the village, but her affection for Martin quickly disappears when he refuses to pass her fit for work. As if he didn't have enough on his plate, the grumpy doctor must also face his fear of blood when tests show that Lorna has a high level of ferritin, which is placing a strain on her heart and liver. Meanwhile, PC Penhale hopes to be selected for an elite police squad by taking part in a survival training course - but ends up shooting himself in the foot

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks is forced to reopen a 14-year-old case when a dying crack addict confesses to the murder of teenager Amanda Bennet, a crime for which her father Simon (guest star Tim McInnerny) was originally convicted. Brooks becomes torn between the belief of his former partner Bernie Rawlins and mounting doubts over the ability of current colleague Casey, and the case unearths the possibility that more ghosts from his drinking days will come back to haunt him. Starring Bradley Walsh and Paul Nicholls

programme.title: Prime Suspect 1973
programme.desc: Bradfield sees a chance to get revenge on Clifford and diverts the team to carry out surveillance on the Bentleys - and when Tennison learns of the operation, she is forced to make a split-second decision as to what is most important, her career or her family? As Bradfield uncovers more details about the heist, he faces the disapproval of his colleagues as he becomes determined to catch them in the act

programme.title: Prime Suspect 1973
programme.desc: The police officers are numb after the explosion, and as they search the rubble, they make a horrifying realisation. The Bentleys make one last stand as a manhunt is launched for Clifford and David, while a distraught Renee is put under arrest. Before long Tennison makes one final discovery about Julie Ann's murder - but as she gets closer to solving the case, she finds herself in mortal danger. Stefanie Martini stars as the novice WPC who would eventually become the tough senior detective made famous by Helen Mirren

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The detective discovers his half-sister's daughter has committed suicide and sets out to find what prompted it, entering the world of teenage rave parties and drug-taking. Meanwhile, Lewis has his sights set on promotion and studies for exams. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Sorcha Cusack, Jason Isaacs and John Junkin

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: World Cup Top Goalscorers
programme.desc: Some of the best strikers in the history of the football World Cup

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is asked to take a diamond to Amsterdam for recutting - but crooks are determined to get their hands on it by any means necessary. Classic adventure, guest starring TP McKenna and Terence Rigby

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A valuable gem is stolen from the Countess of Morcar, leading the famous detective into a bizarre investigation involving a recovered Christmas goose. Mystery, starring Jeremy Brett, David Burke and Ken Campbell

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: When a deranged scientist creates a time machine, Steed and Mrs Peel waste no time at all to show him the error of his ways. With Patrick Macnee, Diana Rigg, and guest star Peter Bowles

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: When Dave's relief manager lets him down at short notice, he asks Terry to step into the breach and run the Winchester Club for him. However, concerns mount for both Terry and Arthur when the landlord fails to return as planned - especially as the club's licence is due for imminent renewal. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A visiting American senator is assassinated in broad daylight. After a newspaper publishes the names of witnesses, Bodie and Doyle are assigned to protect them, but the task soon gets out of hand. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan is joined by an old friend - Turkish policeman Captain Shebbeq - to help him track down a gold-smuggling ring. As he observes a secret government deal to transport the precious commodity, he comes to suspect there is something rather sinister also within the cargo. Nadim Sawalha guest stars, with John Thaw

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates the murder of a journalist friend, following a trail of clues that leads to a cult obsessed with the splendour and savagery of ancient Rome. Drama, guest starring Peter Wyngarde and Ed Bishop

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A governess takes up a new position, but feels constrained to consult Holmes about some of the bizarre conditions stipulated by her employer. Period crime drama, guest starring Natasha Richardson, Joss Ackland and Patience Collier, with Jeremy Brett and David Burke

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: When the Ministry is broken into by an apparently invisible man, it seems a secret formula has fallen into the hands of an organisation run by Soviet Intelligence. Light-hearted action, starring Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur becomes involved with a gambler, whose sudden death leaves the dodgy car dealer £2,000 worse off. Meanwhile, Terry helps his old flame Sylvie leave her abusive husband. Billy Connolly guest stars in the vintage comedy drama, alongside George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley and the team present a line of defence against groups of mercenaries and guerrillas who are waging war on the streets of Britain. David Suchet and Geoffrey Palmer guest star alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: Golf: PGA Tour Highlights
programme.desc: Extended highlights of The Northern Trust tournament from Boston, as the world's leading golfers met in the first of three FedExCup Playoff events, culminating in the Tour Championship at the start of September. A prize purse of $9.5million was up for grabs, with Patrick Reed defending the title he won 12 months ago

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade embarks on one of his most challenging journeys as he investigates reports of a face-eating creature in a remote part of Bolivia. Finding his skills and knowledge tested to the limit, he encounters one of his oldest adversaries and discovers how a species can adapt its behaviour to survive

programme.title: British Superbike Championship Highlights
programme.desc: James Haydon presents action from the second round of the campaign, which came from Snetterton. Scott Redding was the standout performer at the 2019 race staged on this circuit, as he took the chequered flag in both races. The Englishman won 11 races overall last season, as he went on to win the riders' championship by just five points over Australia's Josh Brookes

programme.title: King of the Roads
programme.desc: The Barry Sheene Classic Festival, held annually at England's only closed road race - Oliver's Mount in Scarborough. The event is named after two-time 500cc world champion Barry Sheene, who contested at the parkland circuit for over 15 years and won the feature race four times

programme.title: Sudden Death (1995)
programme.desc: Terrorists seize control of an ice-hockey stadium in the middle of a match attended by the US vice president. Taking the politician hostage, they threaten to blow up the building at the final whistle - but a resourceful former fireman takes it upon himself to thwart their dastardly plot. Action thriller, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Powers Boothe, Raymond J Barry and Whittni Wright

programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Manhunter (1986)
programme.desc: A former FBI agent is coaxed out of retirement to track down a serial killer behind the slaughter of entire families. The detective needs an angle on the murderer's psychology and the only way to get this insight is to face his nightmares and consult cannibalistic psychopath Dr Hannibal Lecktor in prison. Michael Mann's thriller, based on Thomas Harris's novel Red Dragon, with William Petersen, Dennis Farina, Tom Noonan, Brian Cox and Joan Allen

programme.desc: The Flying Squad is assigned to ensure the safe shipment of a gold bullion consignment, threatened by the plans of a brilliant computer expert bent on revenge. Drama, guest starring George Cole and John Hurt, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar is suspected of involvement in a series of jewel robberies on the French Riviera, and has to stay one step ahead of the police long enough to catch the real culprit. Guest starring Ronnie Barker and Aimee Delamain

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An interpreter claims to have been abducted by two villains who forced him to interrogate a badly bruised and obviously distressed Greek captive unable to speak English. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Two spies obtain information about a secret missile base intending to pass it to the other side via a person known as Captain Caruso, whom Steed and Mrs Peel are tasked to locate. Vintage adventure, with Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A tape implicating two senior police officers in a criminal conspiracy is mistakenly delivered to Daley Videos, and Arthur and Terry find themselves placed in contact with its owner - a local major crime boss. Ian McShane, Rula Lenska, Brian Blessed and Ray Winstone guest star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie is captured and held hostage in a vicarage by four German terrorists - and as time runs out, he finds himself forced to make a deal with them before anyone gets hurt. Gabrielle Drake guest stars, with Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A new recruit cannot cope with the stresses of the job and puts the lives of other squad members in jeopardy. A young Lesley Dunlop (Emmerdale's Brenda Walker) features alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.desc: Former boxer Tony Bellew and his coach Dave Coldwell join team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey on the fishing game show, to take part in a series of challenges

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi, Neil Spooner and Tom Dove travel to Thailand, where they have previously caught huge Siamese carp, but this time the focus is on the other species of carp found there. Their adventure is split between Fishing Park Samui and Gillhams Fishing Resorts, where they will have to use all of their skill and knowledge to outwit as many different carp species as possible, and in the process they will be hoping to bank one of the stunning Jullien's golden carp that can be found there

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade hears stories of corpses in the waters at some of America's tourist hotspots, and travels to one of the country's largest dams to uncover the truth. He also visits Florida to investigate more tales of fatal attacks in its waterways

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: When a deranged scientist creates a time machine, Steed and Mrs Peel waste no time at all to show him the error of his ways. With Patrick Macnee, Diana Rigg, and guest star Peter Bowles

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: When Dave's relief manager lets him down at short notice, he asks Terry to step into the breach and run the Winchester Club for him. programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A visiting American senator is assassinated in broad daylight. After a newspaper publishes the names of witnesses, Bodie and Doyle are assigned to protect them, but the task soon gets out of hand. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan is joined by an old friend - Turkish policeman Captain Shebbeq - to help him track down a gold-smuggling ring. As he observes a secret government deal to transport the precious commodity, he comes to suspect there is something rather sinister also within the cargo. Nadim Sawalha guest stars, with John Thaw

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates the murder of a journalist friend, following a trail of clues that leads to a cult obsessed with the splendour and savagery of ancient Rome. Drama, guest starring Peter Wyngarde and Ed Bishop

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A governess takes up a new position, but feels constrained to consult Holmes about some of the bizarre conditions stipulated by her employer. Period crime drama, guest starring Natasha Richardson, Joss Ackland and Patience Collier, with Jeremy Brett and David Burke

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: When the Ministry is broken into by an apparently invisible man, it seems a secret formula has fallen into the hands of an organisation run by Soviet Intelligence. Light-hearted action, starring Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur becomes involved with a gambler, whose sudden death leaves the dodgy car dealer £2,000 worse off. Meanwhile, Terry helps his old flame Sylvie leave her abusive husband. Billy Connolly guest stars in the vintage comedy drama, alongside George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley and the team present a line of defence against groups of mercenaries and guerrillas who are waging war on the streets of Britain. David Suchet and Geoffrey Palmer guest star alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: Golf: PGA Tour Highlights
programme.desc: Extended highlights of The Northern Trust tournament from Boston, as the world's leading golfers met in the first of three FedExCup Playoff events, culminating in the Tour Championship at the start of September. A prize purse of $9.5million was up for grabs, with Patrick Reed defending the title he won 12 months ago

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade embarks on one of his most challenging journeys as he investigates reports of a face-eating creature in a remote part of Bolivia. Finding his skills and knowledge tested to the limit, he encounters one of his oldest adversaries and discovers how a species can adapt its behaviour to survive

programme.title: British Superbike Championship Highlights
programme.desc: James Haydon presents action from the second round of the campaign, which came from Snetterton. Scott Redding was the standout performer at the 2019 race staged on this circuit, as he took the chequered flag in both races. The Englishman won 11 races overall last season, as he went on to win the riders' championship by just five points over Australia's Josh Brookes

programme.title: King of the Roads
programme.desc: The Barry Sheene Classic Festival, held annually at England's only closed road race - Oliver's Mount in Scarborough. The event is named after two-time 500cc world champion Barry Sheene, who contested at the parkland circuit for over 15 years and won the feature race four times

programme.title: Sudden Death (1995)
programme.desc: Terrorists seize control of an ice-hockey stadium in the middle of a match attended by the US vice president. Taking the politician hostage, they threaten to blow up the building at the final whistle - but a resourceful former fireman takes it upon himself to thwart their dastardly plot. Action thriller, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Powers Boothe, Raymond J Barry and Whittni Wright

Michael Mann's thriller, based on Thomas Harris's novel Red Dragon, with William Petersen, Dennis Farina, Tom Noonan, Brian Cox and Joan Allen

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Los Angeles, where he tries to bring family-owned Mexican restaurant La Serenata back from the brink of disaster.
