programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps a family from North Shields search for a property in the picturesque coastal town of La Duquesa on Spain's Costa del Sol

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team investigates issues surrounding fast food. Matt Tebbutt discovers why takeaway chips tend to go soggy, and Kate Quilton examines the challenges of ensuring every branch of a pizza chain produces exactly the same food. The programme also investigates reports of parasites in sushi and discovers why burgers cannot be served rare in the same way that a steak can

programme.title: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: With more than 700 children currently serving prison sentences across England and Wales, the documentary asks why Britain struggles to stop young offenders being sucked into a life of crime. DS Will Whales and his team at Southampton CID investigate 25 burglaries from elderly people's homes, crimes they suspect are connected to a group of teenagers. In Winchester Prison, a young inmate is sent to the segregation unit after climbing onto the roof, while in Hampshire, a probation officer is doing everything she can to keep a prolific offender on the straight and narrow

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Exploring the hopes and expectations of three different men and how they respond to changes that are beyond their control. They include Stanlie, 24, who is airlifted to St George's by helicopter paramedics after being impaled on a metal rod at a construction site

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: A compilation of the best bits from recent series with host Jimmy Carr, team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson, and Countdown regulars Susie Dent and Rachel Riley, joined by a host of top comedians including Alan Carr, Richard Ayoade, Kathy Burke, Roisin Conaty, Joe Wilkinson, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Ryan, Phil Wang, Aisling Bea and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peter: The Human Cyborg
programme.desc: The extraordinary story of the scientist Peter Scott-Morgan, as he turns himself into a cyborg in an attempt to overcome the Motor Neurone Disease that will otherwise kill him. With unprecedented access to Peter and an international group of doctors, scientists, engineers and designers, the programme follows 18 months of one of the most audacious transitions ever undertaken, employing radical surgery, artificially intelligent computers and robotics technology

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: George discovers some of the UK's most impressive historic homes, as he is granted special access to some of these extraordinary places, delving into the hidden recesses that visitors don't normally get to see. In this first episode, George's journey begins in Dorset at the UK's most exquisite example of Italianate architecture - the magnificent 17th-century Kingston Lacy. He uncovers a tale of shame and scandal on the south coast, and the beautiful Cotswold landmark - Hidcote Manor Gardens - in full bloom takes his breath away. George also mines the history of the country's last cave dwellers at one of Britain's best-kept secrets, the Rock Houses at Kinver Edge, and finally, with his husky Loki, takes a walk at spectacular Studland Bay, part of the Jurassic Coast World Heritage Site

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Revisiting some of the most compelling and memorable stories from the past five years, beginning with a series of extraordinary births caught on camera at Chester Zoo. Rhinoceros hornbill Liv and partner Manu are yet to produce any offspring, but when they are moved to a new nest, Liv quickly produces a fresh clutch of egg. Meanwhile, clumsy seahorse Seabiscuit only has a week to attract a female, so he has time to incubate the eggs and give birth in time for the next full moon

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: This time, Take That's Mark Owen brings his 18-month-old Doberman, who needs treatment on a limp, into the surgery. Meanwhile, a four-year-old Coton-Tzu from Dublin with hip dysplasia may require a double hip replacement, and a Border Collie is brought in needing assistance with a problem with lameness

programme.title: Supershoppers
programme.desc: Helen Skelton and Sabrina Grant investigate big fashion brands, uncovering the truth behind the sustainability claims made by big retailers and revealing how consumers can get money back by recycling their shoes. There is also advice on how to make money selling clothes online and a look at the popular 'buy now, pay later' schemes offered by fashion retailers

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to Surrey to meet upcycler Rob, who has a range of sheds a few miles from Gatwick Airport

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin and Frasier inadvertently offer to pay for Daphne's wedding, while Niles sinks into gloom as the marriage approaches and tries to console himself by dating someone new - unaware she is a prostitute. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The station shock-jocks decide to play practical jokes - and Frasier's pompous manner makes him the ideal target for their dubious humour. Starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. When one of the trio stubbornly resists the changes the Scottish chef is hoping to implement, sparks begin to fly

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Philadelphia to help failing Mexican restaurant Zocalo. Owners Greg and Mary Russell met and fell in love while they were working there, and the place held such sentimental importance to them they pooled their money and bought it. Now Gordon tries to turn things around before the floundering business ruins their marriage and tears their family apart

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps John, a widow from County Durham, search for a new property in rural, inland Malaga in Spain, with a budget of £140,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Nurse Karen and GP Alastair from Montrose long to relocate to the beautiful countryside of the Dordogne in France. Laura Hamilton shows them five options for their £175,000 budget

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Thirty seven-year-old elephant Thi is pregnant for the ninth time but the keepers believe she is now three months' overdue. The risks for Thi and her unborn calf are growing by the day, and the staff are worried. Rampant male Rothschild giraffe Meru causes problems for the giraffe herd as he relentlessly chases the females, and male clownfish Polo gets injured while fighting with the other males for the attentions of dominant female Rosie. However, clownfish can change sex at will, and Polo's time alone in an isolation tank produces a surprising side effect

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding present the first in a series of special charity editions of the culinary challenge, with judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. The first set of contestants are documentary maker Louis Theroux, comedians Jenny Eclair and Russell Howard, and athlete Ovie Soko, who are challenged to make a giant biscuit, a classic bake, and a choux sculpture depicting their perfect day

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: George discovers some of the UK's most impressive historic homes, as he is granted special access to some of these extraordinary places, delving into the hidden recesses that visitors don't normally get to see. In this first episode, George's journey begins in Dorset at the UK's most exquisite example of Italianate architecture - the magnificent 17th-century Kingston Lacy. He uncovers a tale of shame and scandal on the south coast, and the beautiful Cotswold landmark - Hidcote Manor Gardens - in full bloom takes his breath away. George also mines the history of the country's last cave dwellers at one of Britain's best-kept secrets, the Rock Houses at Kinver Edge, and finally, with his husky Loki, takes a walk at spectacular Studland Bay, part of the Jurassic Coast World Heritage Site

programme.title: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: This episode of the documentary follows Hampshire Police's Chief Constable Olivia Pinkney and her officers, as they tackle offending in two areas of serious crime - domestic violence and historic sex offences. In Southampton, Detective Sergeant Will Whale, who's been with the police for more than 30 years, is leading the team navigating the domestic abuse cases. Meanwhile, Detective Constable Paul Longhurst is working toward the trial of a PE teacher accused of sexually abusing a number of his pupils

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Daters include 31-year-old Adam, who believes his voice - which has been compared to David Beckham's - puts off potential girlfriends. Eighty-year-old glamorous great-grandma Lynda has been single for three years and is looking for someone to share a good time with, while 27-year-old salon manager Stephanie worries that her excessive sweating could be a turn-off

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: On the 20th anniversary of Location, Location, Location, this show sees Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back on their 20 years of house-hunting, from chocolate-box cottages and future-proof pads, to tackling tough markets and the most memorable offers made. In this opening episode, Kirstie and Phil look back on 20 years of helping first-time buyers, starting with their first-ever televised house hunt with Kate

programme.title: Peter: The Human Cyborg
programme.desc: The extraordinary story of the scientist Peter Scott-Morgan, as he turns himself into a cyborg in an attempt to overcome the Motor Neurone Disease that will otherwise kill him. With unprecedented access to Peter and an international group of doctors, scientists, engineers and designers, the programme follows 18 months of one of the most audacious transitions ever undertaken, employing radical surgery, artificially intelligent computers and robotics technology

programme.title: The Yorkshire Jobcentre
programme.desc: The team of job coaches gives advice to a 58-year-old recently made redundant from his job in IT, where he'd worked for nearly 20 years. A single mother from the Czech Republic who has recently moved to Leeds following a break-up applies for universal credit, but has to take a residence test to determine whether she will be eligible for anything

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Claire Wier hosts the first party in Worcestershire and hopes her low-fat menu and pre-dinner exercise routines are enough to secure her the £1,000 prize. However, her guests are disappointed that the evening meal is lacking in cream, fat, oil and butter

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty pageant queen Pippa Langhorne throws the second party in Worcestershire, and hopes to impress her fellow diners with a sophisticated Midsummer Night's Dream-themed event. However, her starter fails to win the approval of shellfish-hating Claire Wier, and Tim Lawson disapproves on the basis of his friendship with fish. Everyone is surprised as the hostess brings out an unusual dessert, and a guest appearance by her singing dog Buddy rounds off a memorable evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Publican Tim Lawson hosts the third dinner party in Worcestershire, laying on a country-themed evening featuring a novel take on prawn cocktail and a creamy main course. Chris Sheppard finds himself confronted about his tan, while tension mounts between Pippa Langhorne and Claire Wier, who takes issue with her fellow diner's claims to have a white bread allergy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teresa Cox hosts the fourth dinner party challenge from Worcestershire and sets her store on wooing the guests with a lobster starter and an extravagant main course. The menu seems to go down well with the diners, but when the conversation turns to the paranormal there are mixed reactions

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chris Sheppard hosts the final dinner party in Worcestershire, throwing a black-tie-themed evening. He impresses some of his guests with his home-made sweet chilli sauce and potato towers - although Claire Wier finds the presentation pretentious - before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps John, a widow from County Durham, search for a new property in rural, inland Malaga in Spain, with a budget of £140,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Bonnie Motley from Hertfordshire is looking to improve her quality of life, and is convinced buying a holiday home in the guaranteed sunshine of southern Spain is just the way to do that. With friend of 30 years Jonathan along to help her with the decision, Ben Hillman shows Bonnie five properties within her £20,000 budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners are meeting for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. The Hero is first, and hosts Harry and Rowan Glennie want to know why their female guests thought their rooms were too boyish to cut the mustard

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Wokingham in Berkshire to meet professional gardener Mark whose barns are brimful of bikes, bric-a-brac and baggage

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles takes a new position as a magazine art critic, prompting a jealous Frasier to respond by launching his own arts show. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin returns from a friend's funeral upset by how it was conducted, and begins to plan his own memorial. Meanwhile, sacked DJ Bulldog takes the opportunity to embark on an entirely new career - in pizza delivery. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef takes on one of his toughest challenges yet, J Willy's Bar and Grille in South Bend, Indiana, which has amassed debts of more than $1million. On finding an inexperienced chef serving food from both the freezer and tins, together with service that reduces one customer to tears, Gordon Ramsay orders an overnight deep-clean of the premises and designs a menu to inspire the kitchen staff

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johannson helps Glasgow couple Colin and Richard, who have a £200,000 budget to purchase a property in the resort of Playa del Ingles on Gran Canaria

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Kamlesh and Sukhwinder have been married for 42 years, and now their four children have flown the nest, wish to buy a winter home in southern Alicante, with its breathtaking views of the Mediterranean Sea and lively atmosphere. Jean Johansson shows them five properties for their £95,000 budget, but whether any will take their fancy remains to be seen

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: This time, Take That's Mark Owen brings his 18-month-old Doberman, who needs treatment on a limp, into the surgery. Meanwhile, a four-year-old Coton-Tzu from Dublin with hip dysplasia may require a double hip replacement, and a Border Collie is brought in needing assistance with a problem with lameness

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Exploring the hopes and expectations of three different men and how they respond to changes that are beyond their control. They include Stanlie, 24, who is airlifted to St George's by helicopter paramedics after being impaled on a metal rod at a construction site

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Los Angeles, where he tries to bring family-owned Mexican restaurant La Serenata back from the brink of disaster. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to update the interior and introduce a more dynamic menu with dishes that give a fresh spin to classic Mexican cuisine. But what will the customers think of the changes?

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: A compilation of the best bits from recent series with host Jimmy Carr, team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson, and Countdown regulars Susie Dent and Rachel Riley, joined by a host of top comedians including Alan Carr, Richard Ayoade, Roisin Conaty, Aisling Bea, Nick Mohammed, Joe Wilkinson, Sara Pascoe, Kevin Bridges and Joe Lycett

programme.title: Swingers
programme.desc: Documentary about the scene in which people engage in group sex or swap sexual partners, going behind the scenes at one of Britain's most popular swingers' clubs to find out what kinds of people attend and why

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team investigates issues surrounding fast food. Matt Tebbutt discovers why takeaway chips tend to go soggy, and Kate Quilton examines the challenges of ensuring every branch of a pizza chain produces exactly the same food. The programme also investigates reports of parasites in sushi and discovers why burgers cannot be served rare in the same way that a steak can

programme.desc: Jamie Oliver puts his twist on cauliflower cheese as he teams it with spaghetti to create a creamy, silky smooth pasta dish topped off with golden crunchy breadcrumbs. Reinventing another family favourite, Jamie offers a healthier take on the classic chicken Kiev, wrapping the meat in filo pastry instead of breadcrumbs to create light, crispy parcels, while the chef introduces his son Buddy to Scotch bonnet chillies in a spicy barbecue chicken burger, with a tip to manage the heat to suit any member of the family

programme.desc: Will returns from holiday in France and spends every moment with Grace, provoking Nathan's jealousy, and a proud Jack takes his son shopping. Woody Harrelson guest stars

programme.desc: Junior submits a cartoon in a competition and wins first prize, so Michael takes him to meet TV executives to try to get his talent noticed. Meanwhile, Claire threatens to break up with Tony unless he can bring something fresh into their relationship.

programme.desc: Wiltshire couple Edward Lea and his wife found their happy retirement was short-lived when an imposing 8ft breeze-block wall - dubbed the Great Wall of China - was built by their neighbour between their properties. In Scotland, Karen Ryrie and her elderly mother are fed up with living opposite John Tyer, his three dogs and a huge family of rabbits. Following their complaint about the smell, Karen's subsequent accusation of assault has made the dispute far more serious. Elsewhere, Linda Bird had not been expecting to wear headphones around the house when she moved to Bedfordshire for a quiet life, but the issue has escalated beyond excessive noise to become a battle over boundaries with neighbour Stanislav Fajdel

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A dispute between households arising from investments made into a business venture that later failed, and the fury surrounding the construction of an extension that saw damage to an adjacent property. Plus, updates on people and stories featured in previous programmes, including the latest whereabouts of rowdy rapper Elvis Turasinze, who drove his neighbours berserk with his beat-making

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Officers chase £4,500 in court fees in north Wales after a property deal turned sour, and in Birmingham the agents try to collect over £3,500 from a single mum who defaulted on loan repayments. Elsewhere in Worcestershire, the enforcement agents try to recover more than £10,000 from a shop-keeper for fraudulently keeping a deposit during a property sale

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire agents try to collect nearly £2,500 in unpaid parking fines, while officers Matt and Garry head to the West Midlands to recover £4,500 owed from a debtor to his former girlfriend. Agents travel to south-east London looking to collect £3,000 owed by a taxi company

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south-east London, officers Gary and Cona chase a debt of nearly £50,000 in unpaid rent, leading to a feisty confrontation with the debtor. programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.desc: Documentary showing how CCTV and other technological advances are helping to bring car thieves to justice. Suspected criminals in Chester are involved in a high-speed chase through the city centre, and there is footage that helped put an end to one of London's most prolific gangs. The programme also includes film of a getaway in which robbers tried to evade the law by driving at 180mph

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams and inspectors out to nail the litter louts and the fearless sewage warriors clearing the mess. programme.desc: Women in their 20s who make money from having relationships with men over 50, including Jasmine, who has four Sugar Daddies paying her as much as a combined £6,000 a month

programme.desc: Ann announces the closure of the Protection Unit, forcing Will and Vera into preservation mode, while Allie refuses to guarantee Marie's safety, leaving the prison on a knife edge

programme.desc: Reality show in which two families from opposite ends of the wealth and class divide swap homes, budgets and social status for seven days to discover how the other half lives. The Fiddes family from Royal Wootton Bassett rank in the top 10 per cent of Britain's wealthy, and live in a six-bedroom home paid for by husband Matt's chain of martial arts centres. programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Jay tells Michael she thinks the time has come for him to have a vasectomy

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Carol and Trevor Gilmour hoped to renovate a barn and turn it into their dream home, but have been forced to live in a caravan during a long-running dispute with their neighbour over the property's front garden. Plus, a young couple gather shocking footage of the constant harassment they endured, and a farmer is suspected of killing a family's dogs

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: An incident featuring a wheelie bin and a birthday cake sparks a bitter conflict between two neighbours in Wales, and there are explosive consequences when householders take the law into their own hands after continuous loud music drives them to distraction. Meanwhile, a Suffolk man faces eviction after his fellow residents report his toxic cars to the local environmental health office

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Elmor chase over £1,500 of unpaid parking fines in Manchester, while Matt and Garry have a job to reclaim £1,600 for a car hire company in the West Midlands. Finally, Stewart and Vic head to Lancashire to recover over £3,000 owed by a garage to a dissatisfied customer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, agents Matt and Garry chase £1,700 owed by an accountant to a client, and officers Max and Paul try to recover almost £30,000 in north west London owed in rent arrears by a dentist after he was barred from working. Meanwhile, agents Max and Steve head to south west London to chase almost £2,000 owed by a cafe owner

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Iain head to Manchester to recover one of the largest debts they have ever chased - more than £400,000 - owed to a builder after he was failed to receive payment for his work on a house. Meanwhile, officers Gary and Cona are in Kent to chase over £11,000 owed by a couple for unpaid rent

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic become party to a fractured family's school fee woes in Staffordshire and Del and Dael need to reclaim £3,500 after a rental van was returned badly damaged. Stewart and Elmor are in Warwickshire, where the members of a household blame their predicament on a scheming landlord whose subsequent arrival sparks a fierce reaction, while Iain helps Stewart remove a young mother from her Lancashire home

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers swoop on a housing estate searching for suspects involved in a shooting and it needs to be a tightly controlled operation and communication is key between the firearms unit, police helicopters and dog handler Duncan. Elsewhere, Steve responds to reports of a burglary in progress, and ends up on a chase through back gardens. After catching one of the suspects, Steve receives a shock when he returns to check out the burgled house

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A high-powered Porsche is pursued by eight police cars and a helicopter, while Officers Ben P and Ben B attend a crash scene where a car has flipped over and landed on its roof, and their difficult job is made harder by a crowd filming the aftermath of the accident on their phones

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Emmett is disappointed when Jenna reverts to her old ways, Fay arrives from Adelaide, and Shane is concerned he has burned a bridge with Roxy

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Jasmine feels ambushed and makes a run for it, but eventually Tori gets a chance to speak to her alone. Marilyn's personal struggles manifest at work

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Cases include Wendy, who was left with rental arrears of almost £3,000 after renting a house out to a nightmare tenant. Steve from Birmingham Council's housing enforcement team investigates poor living conditions above a local shop. And in south London, lawyer Chris has to deal with his client's site which has been filled by nearly two dozen caravans and a mountain of rubbish

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence

programme.title: Love Actually (2003)
programme.desc: Ten interlinked stories of people searching for and finding love. While the newly elected, bachelor British prime minister is smitten by a junior staff member at 10 Downing Street, a heartbroken writer heads for France to get over a failed relationship, and a faded rock star aims to reinvent himself in time for Christmas. Richard Curtis's romantic comedy, with Hugh Grant, Martine McCutcheon, Emma Thompson, Alan Rickman, Colin Firth, Bill Nighy and Liam Neeson

programme.desc: An investigation into a hit-and-run leads to a property scam, but Green, Rubirosa and Lupo's undercover work takes a surprising twist that pits McCoy against the US Attorney's office. January Jones (Mad Men) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An unfinished building is demolished when a bomb is detonated on-site, killing a 12-year-old boy. Logan and Briscoe call on the construction company, and their suspicions fall on a bankrupt contractor and a jealous husband. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe deal with a double homicide when an abused alcoholic breaks into his parents' former home and murders the current occupants. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green investigate when an adulterous art dealer is stoned to death. The detectives learn that the victim's plan to display provocative art led to unwanted attention from a terrorist organisation and gives them cause to suspect her son - a fanatical Christian - was persuaded by a religious leader to kill his mother. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives respond to a hold-up committed by a bloodthirsty team of robbers in ski-masks, and McCoy struggles to determine whether the teenage tearaway found with the criminals was an unwilling hostage or a active participant in the crimes

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis try to solve the murder of a college student whose death was depicted in graphic detail on the internet. However, the investigation grinds to a halt when they encounter a lawyer who is unwilling to reveal vital information about her client's past

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A former US Navy Seal escapes from prison, intent on finding his wife's real murderer. The break-out sparks a race against time as the NCIS team tries to reach him before he exacts revenge. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sasha Alexander star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and his team are called in to investigate the murder of a fellow NCIS agent. Seemingly aware that he was about to be killed, the victim is known to have swallowed a memory card relating to a cold case he was working on. Tony goes undercover to glean more information - and gets the surprise of his life. Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The remains of a US Marine are found impaled on a tree stump in a forest, where Tony discovers a shell from a multi-purpose assault weapon. The investigation leads to a pawn shop - where evidence of a botched illegal arms deal is uncovered. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy Seal falls to his death while training for a secret mission and his commanding officer believes it was an accident. Analysis of the victim's equipment proves it was sabotaged, but fingerprints at the crime scene reveal nothing, prompting the agents to re-enact the sequence of events before the time allocated for the assignment runs out

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: After a reporter and his fiancee are gunned down outside a restaurant, Goren and Eames are given a seemingly reliable eyewitness description of the killer. However, while on the trail of their suspect, they discover the journalist was planning to publish an expose on corruption within the sanitation industry, taking their investigation in an entirely new direction

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is accused of abusing her teenage stepson - who is later implicated in a murder. As investigations proceed, she goes to great lengths to protect him and prevent the detectives learning the truth. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An elderly woman suffering from Alzheimer's disease breaks into an apartment. Discovering she has been abused, the detectives learn she was released from care to the custody of her scheming son, who becomes the prime suspect. However, shocking revelations about the local nursing home soon come to light

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are faced with the gruesome task of identifying an animal rights activist found decapitated in a park during a romantic rendezvous. The team try to find two potential killers who were in the vicinity - but are later stunned to discover the crime scene was staged to mislead investigators. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Fin investigate the case of a woman found raped and murdered underneath a flyover - and discover $1million of a new cancer drug in the boot of her car. Analysis reveals the dead woman's supplies were fake, linking her to a pharmaceutical racket - but another assault gives the detectives a more immediate concern. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Ice-T

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Chris's reunion with his family is thwarted in shocking fashion when his son Christian is kidnapped while in Andy and Nick's care. As the squad spreads out to search for the boy, Swarek is forced to deal with Andy and Nick's budding relationship, and officers later discover clues to the identity of Christian's abductor - hitting his father with a stunning revelation that threatens to tear his new family apart

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A routine bust in a drugs den soon becomes Detective Nash's first solo homicide case. Meanwhile, Officer Shaw buys a cabin in the woods, Andy tries to find the right time to tell Gail that she slept with Nick, and Traci makes it clear to Steve Peck that she is not looking to date anyone for the time being. Starring Missy Peregrym

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces across the country to reveal how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions against shoplifters. Laughlin are known for their aggressive approach, and it seems they had their eye on Wayward Wally too. Comedy, starring Jason Priestley and Cindy Sampson

programme.title: Private Eyes

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An old acquaintance of Logan's is found dead, and is presumed to have committed suidice until the investigation reveals he was recently in contact with a former priest accused of sex crimes

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A taxi-driver is found dead in his car, and Logan follows a chain of evidence involving a loan shark, a forged cheque and a missing plumber that leads him to believe the victim's wife is the killer. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green comes under investigation by Internal Affairs after he shoots a suspect, and the case reveals a host of secrets the detective would rather keep hidden, threatening not only his police career but his freedom. Jesse L Martin stars, alongside S Epatha Merkerson and Linus Roache

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a prostitute leaves an eminent plastic surgeon as the most obvious culprit. However, Kincaid suspects otherwise, and sets out to discover whether the man was framed

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis helps a woman who claims her baby was kidnapped while she was at confession to retrace her steps. However, legal questions begin to appear when her attorney introduces a unique defence. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of a US Marine and discovers three former members of his unit have recently died. Digging deeper, evidence is uncovered suggesting the commander may be a serial killer who preys on his own men. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The remains of a US Marine are found impaled on a tree stump in a forest, where Tony discovers a shell from a multi-purpose assault weapon. The investigation leads to a pawn shop - where evidence of a botched illegal arms deal is uncovered. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs faces an old adversary who has re-emerged with a plan to assassinate the US president and taken Kate hostage in a bid to ensure success. The FBI manages to foil the attack on the presidential helicopter, Marine One, but the case seems set to end on a downbeat note. Rudolf Martin guest stars, with Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Navy captain is held hostage in his own office while his wife and blind daughter are abducted, and the kidnappers try to extort a large sum of money from him for his family's release. The NCIS team is soon on the case, but initially struggles to identify the chief assailant

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins races to rescue a girl being held captive by her father

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is found raped and murdered in Central Park - and as her work involved contacting sexual partners of HIV patients, the detectives soon have a long list of suspects. The discovery of a second body raises fears that they are dealing with a serial killer - and the trail leads to a man who has no knowledge of the crimes, but is distantly connected to the first victim and her husband

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A rape investigation leads the team to a father and son who are being closely guarded under the witness protection programme so they can testify against Russian mobsters. To complicate matters, the victim is arrested on racketeering charges before it is possible to question her in detail. Pam Grier guest stars alongside Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Dr Huang try to prove a convicted serial killer is responsible for the rape and murder of another woman, whose assailant was never identified. In doing so, they hope to give the victim's parents a sense of closure - but face a race against time as the man is due to be executed in three days. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, BD Wong and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler's wife tells him about a teenage rape victim at the local hospital who is too frightened to go to the police. While trying to find out the girl's identity, he uncovers drug and alcohol abuse at the local school that has him fearing for his daughter's safety - and afraid he may jeopardise his spouse's job. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: When a suspected paedophile is found severely beaten, Andy discovers that Marlo has been carrying out a detailed and unauthorised investigation into the man. He and Swarek must scramble to cover the unprofessional conduct before she is exposed. Meanwhile, Traci oversees a major drug sweep, assisted by Chloe, Nick, Dov and Gail, but when Sam leaves his post, the operation takes an unexpected turn. Starring Missy Peregrym and Gregory Smith

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Chloe are attacked by an unseen shooter when they respond to a routine 911 call. When more shots are fired at a subsequent emergency call, the officers realise that 15 Division is being targeted by someone out for revenge. The clock is ticking as the squad tries to serve and protect, while running down suspects. Meanwhile, Oliver comes face to face with the sniper in a life-changing moment

programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity leads Green and Lupo to suspect an innocent doctor has been murdered in place of a killer's true target, a physician who administered a botched lethal injection in South Carolina. Police drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe investigate the murder of a psychiatrist, and their inquiries lead them to suspect the killer is either the victim's former husband, her obstructive father or a patient with multiple personality disorder

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gay city councillor is shot dead after a meeting, and the trail of suspicion leads the team to a bigoted rival politician and a male prostitute. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A novelist's apparent suicide becomes a murder case, with the evidence leading Lupo and his new partner Kevin Bernard to suspect a secretive religious group. Award-winning police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis uncover new evidence as they investigate a 30-year-old rape and stabbing case, but the victim is consumed with fear when confronted with the possibility of another trial for the perpetrator

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The death of a show-horse leads the team to investigate a woman's disappearance, and the subsequent trial brings to light a possible insurance scam and a sting operation

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs investigates the discovery of a woman's mummified remains, following a trail of clues that takes him and the team to Florida, where they search for another victim who mysteriously disappeared. One of their few leads is a manual on the secret of being a good wife - which eventually points them in the direction of a serial killer

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine helicopter is discovered abandoned in a crop circle with its pilots missing, and witnesses report seeing strange lights in the night sky, adding to the intrigue surrounding the case. Gibbs orders the sightings to be kept under wraps for fear of attracting the attention of UFO enthusiasts, before uncovering a dark secret involving local residents. Guest starring Timothy Bottoms (The Last Picture Show)

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Angie and Shade investigate the mysterious collapse of Zoe's cousin. Detective drama, starring Jason Priestley and Cindy Sampson

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a badly beaten youth is found in the luggage compartment on an airport shuttle bus, leading investigators to make further grisly discoveries as a paedophile ring is exposed. Subsequent inquiries lead them to a travel agency specialising in exotic trips for sexual predators. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The decomposing body of a five-year-old girl is found, leading to the revelation that a homicidal paedophile is on the loose. The subsequent disappearance of a second youngster leads to a race against time to save her from a similar fate. Gritty drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the rape of a cellist, and initially believe her conductor is to blame for the attack - especially given his penchant for erotic film-making. However, they soon discover an obsessive stalker is watching her from afar - and will stop at nothing to continue his monitoring. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cabot takes a child abuse case, determined to find evidence that will convict the defendant. Her personal feelings tempt her to bend the rules, leading Stabler and Benson into an illegal search of the victim's home - a move that threatens all of their careers

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: In the wake of violent targeted attacks on 15 Division, Andy, Swarek and their fellow officers begin to piece together a past crime to find out what has happened to Oliver Shaw. While the squad desperately tries to find him, Dov and Wes clash over what is best for Chloe. As the shooter's plan is finally revealed, it may be too late for some members of the team

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A girl is abducted during a carjacking, but the only link to the missing child is an ex-convict, who proves unwilling to help police with their investigations. As the threat to the victim's safety grows, McCoy is forced to contemplate agreeing to a deal that would compromise his most deeply held principles. Guest starring Adam Arkin, with Sam Waterston, Jesse L Martin and Dennis Farina

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.desc: Wine critics Oz Clarke and Jilly Goolden embark on the cross-country treasure-hunting challenge, travelling around Angus and Perthshire before heading to auction in Edinburgh. They are aided by experts Margie Cooper and James Braxton

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a property in Durham, a flat in Fulham, south-west London, and a cottage in Cornwall. They then follow the sales at auction and talk to the buyers about their plans for the buildings, returning after a few months to review their progress

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ex-RAF officers Simon Stenning and Amanda Butcher have been visiting the Caribbean island of Antigua for several years, and now hope to find the perfect winter home there. Ben Hillman helps the pair, showing them five properties for their £330,000 budget

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Paul Laidlaw and Claire Rawle set off on the final road trip leg from the Derbyshire town of Matlock. Militaria mad Paul hopes a late 17th-century hand-forged halberd head earns him a huge profit. Claire buys a Chinese cloisonné vase and an Edwardian inkstand. Paul also unravels the story behind the world-famous crooked church tower at Chesterfield and Claire meets a relative of the first man to circumnavigate Australia, who hails from the Lincolnshire town of Donnington. The pressure is on at the final auction in Stamford, Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Philip Serrell and Christina Trevanion set off on a trip around Britain seeking out bargains they hope will make a profit at auction. They begin their journey at Castle Douglas in Dumfries and Galloway, before heading south to their first auction in Newcastle upon Tyne

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Jay Blades is at Walsall recycling centre on a mission to save three unwanted items, coming away with a pair of dining chairs, a well-used table and some discarded DJ equipment

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Salvager Drew Pritchard explores a Napoleonic fort in Essex, and tours the medieval Lichfield Cathedral, where he checks out some unwanted objects

programme.desc: The SPCA tries to save a dog that is found hanging by its neck in a yard, and investigators rush to reunite some puppies with their mother

programme.title: Animal Cops Miami
programme.desc: Officers are called to rescue a black bear that has been hit by a car, while investigators confront the owner of an illegal pig-slaughtering operation

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: A biker comes off his vehicle in the Dales and paramedics Daz and Pete must act quickly to restore blood-flow to his foot - if they fail, he could lose his leg

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: A 61-year-old man is treated after an accident involving a chainsaw. And, doctors must act quickly to save a patient whose heart is racing out of control.

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore transforms three items from the Witley Recycling Centre in Surrey, including a collection of fishing rods, and a reproduction designer chair

programme.desc: Sarah helps a busy, hardworking couple who bought their two-bedroom starter home in Croydon, South London, which needs an awful lot of work

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a worrying horned-shaped growth. Elsewhere, Dr Lee treats Kevin, who has a huge lump protruding from his hip

Then, he consults a Las Vegas rabbi after examining a deadly wine cabinet with a connection to the Holocaust

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Ghost hunters Zak Bagans, Nick Groff and Aaron Goodwin invite US TV journalist Dylan Dreyer to join them as they investigate Locke, California, a ghost town formerly run by the Chinese mafia

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Part two of three. At Standon Hall, Staffordshire, Yvette Fielding has some harsh words for husband Karl Beattie as he decides to take a risk that proves too dangerous

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Paul Laidlaw and Claire Rawle set off on the final road trip leg from the Derbyshire town of Matlock. Militaria mad Paul hopes a late 17th-century hand-forged halberd head earns him a huge profit. Claire buys a Chinese cloisonné vase and an Edwardian inkstand. Paul also unravels the story behind the world-famous crooked church tower at Chesterfield and Claire meets a relative of the first man to circumnavigate Australia, who hails from the Lincolnshire town of Donnington. The pressure is on at the final auction in Stamford, Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Philip Serrell and Christina Trevanion set off on a trip around Britain seeking out bargains they hope will make a profit at auction. They begin their journey at Castle Douglas in Dumfries and Galloway, before heading south to their first auction in Newcastle upon Tyne

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Benidorm star Tim Healy and Game of Thrones actor Clive Russell shop around Berwickshire and West Lothian, with the help of antiques experts Margie Cooper and David Harper, before heading to auction in Edinburgh

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a historic building in Derby, a cottage in Faversham, Kent, and a two-bedroom flat in Durham. They then follow the sales at auction and talk to the buyers about their plans for the buildings, returning after three months to review their progress

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps house hunters find their dream homes in popular winter sun destinations. Potential buyers explore the beautiful Caribbean island of Barbados

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell begin the second leg of their journey. The duo start in the North Lakes of Cumbria, travelling from Keswick to an auction in Crooklands

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell begin in the seaside town of Southport as they shop their way around Lancashire before travelling to Lincoln for the auction. As the road trip reaches the half-way point, tension mounts in the saleroom

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore transforms three items from the Witley Recycling Centre in Surrey, including a collection of fishing rods, and a reproduction designer chair

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard visits a sign-writer's business in Portsmouth, where he finds one of his favourite objects. Later, in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, Drew is given a chance to indulge his inner petrol-head as he meets Porsche restorers

programme.title: Animal Cops Miami
programme.desc: Investigators try to trace a man caught on CCTV beating a cat, two neglected dogs are found just in time, and owls are rescued from a demolition site

programme.title: Animal Cops Miami
programme.desc: The team members get back on the beat to solve more animal problems. Investigators discover two adopted dogs wandering the streets of Miami in need of help

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: Dr Paul is worried his young patient may have a lethal brain haemorrhage after a head-on collision with a lorry. The team is scrambled to a riding centre in East Yorkshire

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's Renovate Don't Relocate
programme.desc: Sarah helps a busy, hardworking couple who bought their two-bedroom starter home in Croydon, South London, which needs an awful lot of work

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Jay Blades rescues a set of discarded bedroom cabinets, an old door and a steamer trunk, items that he and two other recycling experts try to breathe new life into

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell begin the second leg of their journey. The duo start in the North Lakes of Cumbria, travelling from Keswick to an auction in Crooklands

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Serial Killer Spirits
programme.desc: Investigating the locations of America's most notorious serial killers. The crew investigates a home in Indiana where HH Holmes killed a young boy

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown with Nick Groff
programme.desc: Ghost hunters Nick Groff and Katrina Weidman unlock the dark secrets of HMS Shrewsbury Prison, exploring 200 years of executions, anger and tragedy - and discovering new threat

programme.title: Deadly Possessions
programme.desc: Zak Bagans examines a once-cursed chest for proof that it can no longer cause death and destruction. Then, he investigates an artifact from one of the most brutal mob hits in US history to determine if it harbours any spirits

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Zak Bagans, Nick Groff and Aaron Goodwin climb aboard the legendary 150-year-old Star of India, docked in San Diego. Once a vessel carrying immigrants and workers, it now carries the souls of a suicide victim and children who failed to survive, providing a fertile ground for paranormal investigation

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Part three of three. At Standon Hall, Staffordshire, Yvette Fielding and the team conclude what has arguably been their scariest investigation to date

programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell begin the second leg of their journey. The duo start in the North Lakes of Cumbria, travelling from Keswick to an auction in Crooklands

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Poets Benjamin Zephaniah and Roger McGough take on the treasure-hunting challenge in which two celebrities face off, travelling around Northamptonshire, Derbyshire and Nottinghamshire before heading to a decisive auction in Leicester. They are joined by Philip Serrell and Natasha Raskin, eager to help their amateur team-mates win

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts take a look at a flat in Fulham, London, a semi-detached house in Northumberland and a double property in Dover, all of which have been sold at auction

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Su and Reg Roberts from south Wales first fell in love with Tobago 20 years ago and have been back every other year since. Now, with their children growing up and retirement approaching, they're ready to turn their dream of a holiday home on the island into a reality. Presenter Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties within their £310,000 budget

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell set out on the penultimate leg of their trip, beginning the day in Manchester before heading to an auction in the village of Melbourne near York

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It is the final leg of the road trip and Philip Serrell's chance to try to even the stakes after Christina Trevanion took the lead. The pair start their journey in Liverpool and head for the final showdown in Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire

programme.desc: Drew Pritchard's never-ending hunt temporarily concludes at a pub filled with quirky antiques in Winchester, Hampshire, and makes a controversial purchase elsewhere in the county

programme.title: Animal Cops Miami
programme.desc: An investigator fights to save a sick dog that has been rejected by its owners, while a girl rescues a horse left without any food or water

programme.title: Animal Cops Miami
programme.desc: Investigators seize 400 farm animals in one of the biggest operations of its kind in Miami, and also rescue an injured alligator

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: The Yorkshire Air Ambulance race to rescue an army veteran on Remembrance Sunday and help a motorcyclist who is left badly injured after a huge crash

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a worrying horned-shaped growth. Elsewhere, Dr Lee treats Kevin, who has a huge lump protruding from his hip

programme.title: Money for Nothing

programme.title: Ghost Bait
programme.desc: Bob and Tina get a call from a Georgia family experiencing paranormal activity linked to a nearby construction site where human remains have been uncovered. To save her family, the mother must take a stand against the evil entity

programme.title: Ghost Bait

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Part two of two. Data's malevolent brother Lore persuades him to join forces with the Borg, and he responds by taking Picard hostage - leaving Dr Crusher in charge of a skeleton crew aboard the Enterprise. Patrick Stewart and Brent Spiner star

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When a neighbour begins acting oddly and boards up the windows of his house, Melinda realises he is being pursued by a vengeful ghost, and resolves to intervene. A conversation with the phantom reveals a belief that the haunted householder murdered his granddaughter - but further evidence implies that all is not as it first seems. Starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Stone, Cassandra and Ezekiel investigate strange events at an ancient burial ground. Could an ongoing dig have awakened dark spirits? Fantasy adventure, starring John Larroquette, Rebecca Romijn, Christian Kane, Lindy Booth and John Kim

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: The presenter explores the crimes of Graham Frederick Young who, after serving 15 years for poisoning his parents, laced an entire factory's tea with deadly thallium

programme.title: Air Ambulance ER
programme.desc: Documentary following Britain's emergency helicopter medical services. A team races to the aid of a mother and daughter involved in a high-speed motorcycle crash, before zipping off to the Lake District to help a cyclist hit by a car. Timing is everything, too, when the crew turn their attention to a four-year-old girl with a serious leg fracture

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: Bonfire night brings back-to-back emergency calls, as masked youths hurl fireworks at officers out on patrol and a search for a missing girl takes an unusual turn

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Officers of the City of London police attempt to maintain control of crowds at football matches

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Members of the Road Crime Unit chase a drug dealer on the M5, and the Tactical Aid group prepares for a raid to confiscate illegal substances. Meanwhile, dog handler Daryl and his German shepherd Murphy are on the trail of the drivers of a stolen car that crashed in Exeter

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of backpackers Erez Eltawil and Reini Weigel, who formed a controversial relationship with their kidnappers after being captured in Colombia

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alien ambassadors visit the Enterprise on a cultural exchange, causing Worf to lose his temper. What's more, Picard is forced to make an unscheduled landing on a mysterious planet, where he is drawn into the arms of a love-starved woman. Patrick Stewart and Michael Dorn star

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: At an exhibition, the ghost of an artist enlists Melinda's help to obtain a fair price for his work, so his struggling daughter can have the money. However, she first has to resolve a rift between the pair, because his imprisonment ruined their chance to get to know each other

The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Morgana succumbs to a mysterious illness and a new physician arrives in Camelot just in time to cure her. programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: An insight into the work of the police dogs of the West Yorkshire force as they hunt for drugs and track down burglars. Also featured are two of Europe's most famous canine detectives, Eddie and Keela - formerly employed by South Yorkshire Police - whose skills have been used in the hunt for Madeleine McCann and the investigation into allegations of child abuse in Jersey. Narrated by Ken Stott

programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb advises a couple looking for a holiday home in Cyprus for under £70,000, weighing up the pros and cons of a mountain lodge, a 200-year-old village house and a luxury villa

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: After spending the night together Laura worries whether Mike will still be interested in her. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb gives her expert opinion to British house-hunter Adrian Wilkes, who is searching for a property on the Caribbean island of Grenada, where he hopes to purchase the perfect holiday home for £60,000

programme.title: Eat to Live Forever with Giles Coren
programme.desc: The food critic takes up three extreme regimens in an effort to push the limits of life expectancy and meets people from around the world whose pursuit of longevity is an obsession that dominates every aspect of their lives. He undertakes the calorie restriction diet, before going on one that consists only of foods hunted, fished or gathered by mankind's Paleolithic ancestors and ends with another made up almost entirely of fruit. Throughout the process, Giles's health is monitored by his doctor, who assesses the impact these dietary habits are having on his body

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: Manganinnie (1980)
programme.desc: An Australian Aboriginal woman goes in search of her lost tribe, accompanied on her journey by a lost white girl. with whom she forms a close bond despite having no common language. As their journey towards the coast continues, the woman begins to suspect her people and culture may have been all but wiped out by British colonists. Historical drama, starring Mawuyul Yanthalawuy and Anna Ralph

programme.title: Malachi's Cove (1973)
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl in a 19th-century Cornish village is left to fend for herself after her parents die. She finds a way to support herself and her wheelchair-bound grandfather by gathering seaweed along the coast and selling it. Family drama, starring Donald Pleasence, Veronica Quilligan, Peter Vaughan and Arthur English

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb takes a mother and daughter on a tour of tempting properties along Turkey's Turquoise Coast, including a huge mountain house with garden and sea views - a bargain at £42,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb advises British house-hunters looking for a place in Crete, showing them round a traditional Greek home, a modern village property and an old Venetian-style farm, each for less than £60,000

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Homeowners work to increase the value of their properties, redesigning and refurbishing for maximum profits

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb gives her expert opinion to British house-hunter Adrian Wilkes, who is searching for a property on the Caribbean island of Grenada, where he hopes to purchase the perfect holiday home for £60,000

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: The story of Prince Harry and Meghan Markle's relationship, examining whether their marriage will radically change the British monarchy

programme.title: Paper!
programme.desc: A piece of London history. Shot in the 1960's on 8mm film featuring the many news vendors around London selling the three evening newspapers

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: The house is rocked by controversy when the publication of a scandalous novel exposes Blanche's unconventional lifestyle, bringing the doctor face to face with the author of the book and her former lover Lady Portia Alresford. But when the passion between the pair reignites, the doctor becomes conflicted. Meanwhile, Persie reveals a shocking secret to Hallam, and Beryl's workload prompts her to take a stand - until a familiar old face appears to offer a few wise words. Emilia Fox guest stars, with Alex Kingston, Jean Marsh, Ed Stoppard and Claire Foy

programme.title: Burning an Illusion (1981)
programme.desc: A black woman living in West London hopes to marry her boyfriend, but finds her life thrown into upheaval when he loses his job and is subsequently arrested after getting into a fight. The experience makes her reassess her priorities, and she decides to reconnect with her African heritage. Drama, starring Cassie McFarlane and Victor Romero Evans

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams

programme.title: Fox
programme.desc: Drama following the lives of a London gangster and his family. Starring Peter Vaughan, Ray Winstone and Bernard Hill. Originally broadcast in 1980

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The tourists reach Florence, but their appreciation of the Renaissance splendour is disrupted as Pasquale has difficulties with the laundry and Brendan is embarrassed by his travelling companions during a lesson at an art school. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Dale's Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Members of the public go wild in the aisles in the high-speed trolley-dash quiz, competing for prizes including £5,000 in cash. Dale Winton hosts

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Katherine Kelly (who played Becky McDonald in Coronation Street) and Patsy Palmer (EastEnders' Bianca Jackson) are joined by their families as they compete to win up to £30,000 for their respective chosen charities, the Lamproom Theatre Trust, Save the Children and the Dream Foundation. Vernon Kay hosts the long-running game show

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Formula One commentator David Coulthard and his family take on TV presenter Anthea Turner and her relatives to win up to £30,000 for their respective chosen charities, the Dumfries and Galloway Royal Infirmary, and the Chase Children's Hospice and North Staffordshire Asperger/Autism Association. Vernon Kay hosts

programme.title: Weakest Link

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for the chance to compete for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman
